videos.title: Ski To Sun Marathon Cross-country Ski Race 2019
videos.description: Enjoy scenes from the Methow Valley Nordic and Methow Trails Ski to Sun Marathon Race in January 26th, 2019.  40 kilometer marathon and relay race through the scenic Methow Valley.

videos.title: Ski To the Sun 2022 - Final Version
videos.description:
Hosted by the Methow Trails and Methow Valley Nordic Skiing Educational Foundation, this marathon length race stretches the length of the Methow Valley from Mazama up to Sun Mountain.  41+ km with a rigorous uphill the last 10 kilometers.

Filmed and edited in under 12 hours.  
Telegraphix Studios in Winthrop, Washington

videos.title: Ski the  Methow Valley Rendezvous Trails
videos.description:
Popular destinations for overnight hut camping the Rendezvous trails cover valley floor to high-forested ridges above Methow Valley and the Cub Creek side. 

http://botnw.com/methow-valley-rendezvous-trails/

videos.title: 30k Ski from Winthrop to Mazama on February 20, 2015
videos.description: Spectacular day for a 30 kilometer ski from Winthrop to Mazama!  Conditions were fantastic. Come ski the Methow, you will not regret it.  Daily grooming report and photos on our website at methowtrails.org and our Methow Trails Facebook page.

videos.title: Methow Valley Nordic Team - Jan 31st Time Trial
videos.description:
The Methow Valley Nordic Team was out this weekend skiing the Liberty Bell High School trails. Watch them sharpen their skills for next weekend's Race of the Methow event. 
We hope to see you there!

videos.title: Ski to the Sun Ski Marathon & Relay 2019
videos.description: A 42km XC ski race in the Methow Valley, WA. Individual and relay options. Part of the American Ski Marathon Series. For more information visit https://www.methowtrails.org/events/2019-ski-to-the-sun-marathon-and-relay/01-26-2019
tags: Cross Country Skiing american ski marathon series Methow Valley MVNSEF Cross country ski racing

videos.title: Methow valley cross country skiing / Mazama / Upper River Run to Jacks Point / Bush school trailhead
videos.description:
This video showcases our cross country ski trip up in Mazama starting from the Bush School Trailhead towards Upper River Run trail towards Jacks Point and looping back down Upper Jacks to Cassal Cutoff and back via the Methow trail.



It was a wonderful cross country ski experience, the views were phenomenal and we saw maybe 4 couples all together during this trip so it was mostly just us and nature the whole time.



For more content, questions or travel and adventure ideas, comment below! And join my FB group Rei's Roamings at https://www.facebook.com/groups/809854716456895


Thanks for watching!
